description_long: This is a modern, asymmetrical wooden cabinet or shelf unit featuring a striking geometric design with two main horizontal surfaces extending at right angles. The structure is composed of vertical wooden slats that create a semi-transparent effect, allowing partial visibility into the interior compartments. The main body is a tall rectangular block, with a secondary, smaller cuboid shelf protruding from one side. The surfaces appear to be made of a dark, polished wood, while the slatted sections provide both visual interest and ventilation. The interior spaces are open and accessible, suitable for storing or displaying items. The overall design is contemporary and would fit well in urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or upscale public spaces.
description: A modern, asymmetrical wooden cabinet with slatted sides and two main horizontal surfaces, featuring open compartments and a striking geometric form.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the intersecting horizontal surfaces and the slatted vertical structure, highlighting the overall geometric layout.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the open compartment and the depth of the main shelf, with slatted sides partially revealing the interior.
description_view_2: Opposite top-down view displaying the other side of the cabinet, with the secondary shelf protruding and the slatted design visible.
description_view_3: Side view from the end of the secondary shelf, showing the open compartment and the layered slatted construction.
